keyFeatures.en: Generate full video projects from a single prompt using AI.
keyFeatures.zh: 通过单个提示使用AI生成完整的视频项目

keyFeatures.en: Suite of image and video editing tools.
keyFeatures.zh: 一系列图像和视频编辑工具

description.en: No credit limit, no file size limit, no commercial use allowed.
description.zh: 无积分限制，无文件大小限制，不允许商业使用

description.en: Unlimited credits, up to 100MB file size, commercial use allowed.
description.zh: 无积分限制，最大100MB文件大小，允许商业使用

weaknesses.en: Limited to free tier without credits for commercial use.
weaknesses.zh: 免费套餐不支持商业使用，需要付费

weaknesses.en: No specific mention of customer support or community resources.
weaknesses.zh: 未明确提及客户支持或社区资源

targetAudience.en: Modern creators who need to create, edit, and grow their content on every channel.
targetAudience.zh: 需要在每个渠道上创建、编辑和增长内容的现代创作者

positioning.en: Kapwing positions itself as a modern video platform for creative teams, offering AI-driven video generation and a suite of editing tools.
positioning.zh: Kapwing 定位为创意团队的现代视频平台，提供基于AI的视频生成和一系列编辑工具
